titleStmt.title: SII 15.572: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 572. (B.K. No. 75 of 1927-28.) DŌṆĪ, MUNDARGI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the chāvaḍi.

The record, engraved in continuation of B.K. No. 74 of 1927-28 (published in the Bombay Karnatak Inscriptions, Vol. I, Part II, No. 140, pp. 169 ff) contains two incomplete dates: (1) 13, Sunday and (2) Pushya śu. 15, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa. These cannot be verified.

It seems to register gifts of land, shops and house-sites by the Mahājanas of Drōṇīpura, to the basadi built by Sōviseṭṭi. The supplement, engraved on the top of the slab, records gifts of oil-mill and betel nut.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
13 Ādivāradaṁdu dēvara nivēśaṇaṁ pattire baḍagalu Aṁgaḍi 4 maṁ maneyumaṁ Ūro
ḍeya pramukhaśēṣa mahājanaṁgaḷu mā baraṁvirddu koṭṭaru Adakke sīme paḍuvalu
bīdiye mēre . baḍagalu rājabīdiye mēre . mūḍalu bhaṁḍasāleyavara maneye mēre © mattaṁ vū
roḍeya pramukha mahājanaṁgaḷu dirbbaruviddu puṇyatithiyalu dēvargge koṭṭa tōṁṭa
mattaru 1 . Adakke śīme mūḍalu mēṭiya dōṁṭa mēre . teṁkalu kalabhaṁḍiya baḍi
mēre . paḍuvalu maligēsvaradēvara tōṁṭave mēre . baḍagalu Ōṇiye mēre . ma
ṟuvadiṁba saṁvatsarada . puśya suddha 15 Ā vuttarāyaṇa saṁkra tiyalu naḍu
mūḍalu haḷaya mēre teṁkalu haḷaya
keye mēṟe maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī
Ekōḍi jināleyaṁ dharmmaṁ pratipāḷisuvaru
svasti śrīmatu seṭikāṟa mahājana biṭṭa dharmma gāṇake giḷigida ye
ṇeya biṭṭaru Ā dharmmavanu pratipāḷisuvaru śrī śrī śrī
Aḍakeya Āḷige [Aḍake] 2 ḍaṁ dēvarige koṭṭaru mahājana seṭṭiyarumādevaruṁ dharmmavaṁ pratipāḷisuvaru .
Digital edition of SII 15.572 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
